text: Okay so this morning I had another spin lock, and it was able to create the crash dump. The stacktrace info from /var/log/messages, the crash dumps from /var/crash and my current kernel are all available here https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LtXPg3XarwWxAwTZuzD3ug6oY_QGJUT9/view?usp=sharing
